calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
JPT. Cary Gold Clerks: M. Vallejo, CSR. Joe Vickstein.
Arnold Evje, II. Esq., for Plaintiff Villa Jacinto also present.
Defendant, Marcima Chan present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by written stipulation.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Judgment pursuant to stipulation.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
